name: Great Bread Spreads
recipeIngredient: Equal amount of butter and olive oil or canola oil blended in a blender
Stored in the refrigerator (substitute has 50% less cholesterol and saturated fat than solid dairy butter)
recipeInstructions:
1. Instant Apricot Butter
- Combine equal amounts of dried apricots with water in a blender
- Process until smooth
2. Instant Prune Spread
- Mix about 1/4 cup apple juice or orange juice with a handful of pitted prunes
- Perfect topping for breads, waffles, and pancakes
3. Avocado Spread
- Mash 1 avocado with 1 big spoonful of salsa
- Colorful topping, ideal for Mexican cornbread
4. Garlic and Herb Spread
- Blend 1/2 lb firm tofu, 1 garlic clove (pressed), soy sauce, dried basil, oregano, and chives
- Stir in herbs; great with thinly sliced raw veggies on savory breads
5. Olivado Spread
- Blend olive oil, 2 garlic cloves (pressed), black pitted olives, and a pinch each of dried oregano, basil, rosemary, and thyme
- Serve with herbed breads
6. Nut Butters
- Available in various forms including peanut, almond, sesame seed, cashew, pistachio, and sunflower butters
- Simple, high-protein spreads that pair well with whole grain, nutty, or sweet breads
